sections.name: Comment
lines: # IV Mass of the B. V. M. – Salve, Sancta Parens

sections.name: Evangelium
lines: Continuation ++ of the Holy Gospel according to John

v.  Now there stood by the cross of Jesus, his mother, and his mother's sister, Mary of Cleophas, and Mary Magdalen. When Jesus therefore had seen his mother and the disciple standing whom he loved, he saith to his mother: Woman, behold thy son. After that, he saith to the disciple: Behold thy mother. And from that hour, the disciple took her to his own.

sections.name: Offertorium
lines: Blessed art thou, O Virgin Mary, who didst bear the Creator of all things, thou didst bring forth who made thee, and remainest a virgin forever. (Alleluia.)
